sentences.arabic: تَعْتَمِدُ الْإِنْتَاجِيَّةُ الْحَدِيثَةُ عَلَى الْقُدْرَةِ عَلَى التَّرْكِيزِ وَسَطَ الْمُشَتِّتَاتِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ الْمُسْتَمِرَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Savremena produktivnost zavisi o sposobnosti fokusiranja usred stalnih digitalnih ometanja.
sentences.translationEn: Modern productivity depends on the ability to focus amidst constant digital distractions.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الْخُبَرَاءُ بِتَقْنِيَةِ "بُومُودُورُو"، الَّتِي تَتَضَمَّنُ فَتَرَاتٍ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ الْمُكَثَّفِ تَعْقُبُهَا اسْتِرَاحَاتٌ قَصِيرَةٌ.
sentences.translation: Stručnjaci preporučuju "Pomodoro" tehniku, koja uključuje periode intenzivnog rada praćene kratkim pauzama.
sentences.translationEn: Experts recommend the 'Pomodoro' technique, which involves periods of intense work followed by short breaks.

sentences.arabic: تَرْتِيبُ الْمَهَامِ حَسْبَ اسْتِعْجَالِهَا وَأَهَمِّيَّتِهَا يُسَاعِدُ فِي تَحْقِيقِ الْأَهْدَافِ بَعِيدَةِ الْمَدَى بِكَفَاءَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Redanje zadataka prema njihovoj hitnosti i važnosti pomaže u efikasnom postizanju dugoročnih ciljeva.
sentences.translationEn: Prioritizing tasks according to their urgency and importance helps in achieving long-term objectives efficiently.

sentences.arabic: غَالِبًا مَا تُؤَدِّي مَسَاحَةُ الْعَمَلِ الْفَوْضَوِيَّةِ إِلَى تَشَتُّتِ الذِّهْنِ، مِمَّا يَعُوقُ حَلَّ الْمُشْكِلَاتِ بِإِبْدَاعٍ.
sentences.translation: Haotičan radni prostor često dovodi do rasejanosti uma, što ometa kreativno rješavanje problema.
sentences.translationEn: A cluttered workspace often leads to a cluttered mind, hindering creative problem-solving.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ اسْتِثْمَارَ الْوَقْتِ فِي التَّخْطِيطِ عِنْدَ بِدَايَةِ الْيَوْمِ يُوَفِّرُ سَاعَاتٍ مِنَ الْجُهْدِ الضَّائِعِ لَاحِقًا.
sentences.translation: Investiranje vremena u planiranje na početku dana štedi sate izgubljenog truda kasnije.
sentences.translationEn: Investing time in planning at the start of the day saves hours of wasted effort later on.
